systemStatus.headline: Mon Jun 1 4 AM run COMPLETE. Toast Sat May 30 fully parsed (incl. SDLW). Sun May 31 Toast daily + Mon Jun 1 Sling roster NOT yet delivered (arrive ~midday). 2 Google Ads reports last 24h.
systemStatus.detail: (1) Toast: Sat May 30 Daily Performance Summary fully parsed — Net $8,761.35 (-1.1% SDLW), Gross $9,257.80 (+2.1% SDLW), 300 guests (-2.6%), 225 orders (+29.3%), labor 18.5% ($1,619.82), discounts $496.45 (+132.3% SDLW), voids $151.50. Sun May 31 daily not delivered at run time. (2) Sling: Mon Jun 1 roster not delivered; last confirmed roster Sun May 31 (8 emp / 42.24 hrs / 0 uncov / 0 OT). (3) Google Ads: 2 report emails last 24h, no disapprovals. SECURITY: new billing user added/invited May 30 still UNVERIFIED. (4) Yelp Ads: biz.yelp.com session still expired — RE-LOGIN NEEDED; 1 community question last 24h. (5) TripAdvisor: no ad email last 24h. (6) GitHub PAT: 200 OK read+write.

toast.source: Parsed from Toast Group daily summary HTML (no-reply@toasttab.com), subject 'The Brewhouse Santa Barbara Group - Saturday, May 30'. Detailed per-location email (dayparts/categories/revenue centers) not yet delivered at run time.

yesterday.note: Live scrape via Chrome on Sun May 31 ~7 AM PT, Yesterday (May 30) date range, account 343-687-4835. Cost up $0.20 vs comparison period. Conversions still 'pending' (Google calculating). 7,866 impressions, 151 clicks, CTR 1.92%, CPC $0.15.

upcoming.name: Erin Simpson
